title: Extra Crops
description: Adds new crops, takes inspiration from grow a garden
body:
## Welcome to Extra Crops! + This mod adds a bunch of new crops to the game as well as food.
+ Takes inspiration from grow a garden (mutations), leaving the crop for too long can turn it into its variants (most are seen in real world)
+ Reclaimer - use this to get your seeds back when breaking the plant
+ Mystery Seed - break this to obtain seeds from the mod, craft using 8 seeds and one chest + Flower Seed Packet - get a random flower seed from the mod (Blossom Types can only be crafted) + Stone Mill - right click while holding crop to either Grind, Dehull, Crack, Polish, Crush + Available functions: + Dehull - Buckwheat

+ v1.3 Experimental Update: Added custom modeled flowers

![Silly Pack Bee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75eeda7f0b49d1edc89d2b3b0d66968c96c1a380_0.webp)


Credits:
Most textures are from ![minecraft-heads.com](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3d37c903a07201acae849849b9e3c6d3d7490d_0.webp)
